title: Conclave on Zonama Sekot

{{Quote|Now that we finally know what the Force wanted for the Yuuzhan Vong, it's time to ask what the Force wants for us.|Luke Skywalker addresses the gathered [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]|<ref name="UF" />}}
A '''conclave''' was called by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] at the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Held on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], it gathered together virtually all the Jedi, including the students onboard the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' and those stationed at the [[Shelter]] in [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]]. Allowing everyone a day to mingle and catch-up, Skywalker convened the meeting in a forest clearing, delivering an opening address discussing the repercussions of the war and directions for the future of the [[New Jedi Order|Order]].<ref name="UF" />

At the meeting it was decided to relocate the Jedi Order to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], a move suggested by [[Kam Solusar]]. Other Jedi also decided on various courses of action, such as a number continuing to serve on the [[High Council (Galactic Alliance)|High Council]], aiding in the reconstruction of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], returning home or aiding the military.<ref name="UF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
